gist.headline: Hot off the press
gist.blurb: Akhbaar just sprouted in the greenhouse! It's a clever new app that digests daily tech report PDFs and turns them into structured JSON insights and a live news feed.
gist.summary: Added Akhbaar to the community apps showcase, a tool that converts daily tech report PDFs into structured JSON insights.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Akhbaar in the greenhouse and see how it leverages AI to create live tech news feeds from PDF reports.
gist.visual_concept: Akhbaar means news. The app converts PDFs to JSON. Depict the Nomnom creature eating PDF documents and producing JSON code, while Polly the bee wears a newsboy cap and holds a newspaper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a stack of PDF documents while glowing JSON code blocks appear nearby. The cute bee mascot hovers next to it wearing a tiny retro newsboy cap, holding a rolled-up newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
